drl:
rule "R0"
salience($b0_0_1)
agenda-group "ga"
when
    $p0_0 : T0($b0_0_0 : f1, $b0_0_1 : f2)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
    insert(new T2(3.0, $p0_0.isF3()));
    insert(new T1($p0_0.getF2(), $b0_0_1, 12, $p0_0.isF0()));
end
rule "R1"
no-loop
when
    $p1_0 : T1($b1_0_0 : f1, $b1_0_1 : f1)
    T1(f0 < 3.5, $b1_1_0 : f2, $b1_1_1 : f2)
then
    insert(new T2(-1.5, $p1_0.isF3()));
end
rule "R2"
salience 10
when
    $p2_0 : T1(f2 > -1000000007, f2 == 8)
then
    insert(new T2($p2_0.getF0(), $p2_0.isF3()));
    insert(new T2($p2_0.getF1(), $p2_0.isF3()));
end
rule "R3"
salience($b3_1_0)
when
    T1($b3_0_0 : f1, $b3_0_1 : f1)
    T1(f0 < 3.5, $b3_1_0 : f2, $b3_1_1 : f2)
then
    drools.setFocus("ga");
end
